name: Mosaic
description: The scene behind the window pixelated into coarse cells instead of blurred, the privacy-glass look. Nothing behind the window is readable but its colours still show through. Cell size, corner radius and an optional tint are this pack's own parameters. It shows through wherever the window itself is translucent, and lowering the Content opacity parameter fades the window content so the mosaic shows on opaque windows too.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Cell size
parameters.description: Size of the mosaic cells (px), larger cells hide more

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Corner rounding of the pane (px, match the Border pack)

parameters.name: Content opacity
parameters.description: How visible the window content stays over the pane, where 1.0 is fully opaque and 0.0 shows only the mosaic

parameters.name: Tint strength
parameters.description: How strongly the tint colour washes over the cells
